series_metadata.series_description: These forms are utilized to immediate safety issues only. DRC Forms included: Hot Work Permit #1517, Bicycle Inspection #1643, Confined Space Entry Permit/Lockout Tag Out #1682, Powered Industrial Truck Pre-Operation Log #6319, Confined Space Permit #6328, Respirator Inspection Record #6329.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: one month from date of issue
